title: Lychnis scottii
taxonomy: Lychnis scottii is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the western United States. The species is closely related to other Lychnis species and shares similar characteristics. Lychnis scottii is often classified within the genus Lychnis, which includes a range of flowering plants commonly known as campions or bloody cranesbills. Further classification may also group it within the tribe Sileneae.
